patches.hypothesis: The original patch specifically handles Integer.MIN_VALUE but does not account for other edge cases involving extreme values or negative numbers. To fix this, we need to ensure that the method correctly handles all edge cases, especially those involving the minimum and maximum integer values. We will refine the method to avoid overflow issues and handle all possible edge cases gracefully.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug arises because dividing Integer.MIN_VALUE by 2 results in an overflow, as the result cannot be represented within the range of a 32-bit signed integer. The fix involves handling the special case where one of the inputs is Integer.MIN_VALUE.
